_schema.description: Hard-tier baselines, two columns per env. published_sota: literature reference number with citation. our_baseline.{random,strong}: what we measured running our own random + strong baselines under TIME_BUDGET_HARD = 3600 s on a single RTX 3090 Ti. The agent's hard-tier score is judged against our_baseline; the published_sota column is informational. Fill our_baseline by running scripts/build_baselines_hard.py (TODO).

published_sota.value: PPO+RND reaches ~12 of 22 achievements at 1B env steps; PPO ~9; the two tier-4 achievements (Collect-Diamond, Eat-Plant) remain unreached.
published_sota.source: Matthews et al. 2024, 'Craftax: A Lightning-Fast Benchmark for Open-Ended Reinforcement Learning', arxiv 2402.16801

our_baseline.note: TODO: run our random + strong baselines under TIME_BUDGET_HARD on the linux GPU host.

published_sota.value: DRL-Agent (IMPALA+rewards) and Torchbeast/IMPALA reach <10% completion from scratch; the env is part of the published MiniHack 'Hard' suite that no from-scratch baseline solves at 100M steps.
published_sota.source: Samvelyan et al. 2021, 'MiniHack the Planet: A Sandbox for Open-Ended Reinforcement Learning Research', NeurIPS Datasets and Benchmarks; subsequent work (BALROG 2025) confirms <10%.

our_baseline.note: Linux-only env; TODO on the linux GPU host.

published_sota.value: PGMORL Pareto hypervolume ~5.4e6 vs reference (-100, -200) over 64 preference vectors; Envelope MORL ~5.0e6; scalarized PPO ~3.2e6.
published_sota.source: Xu et al. ICML 2020, 'Prediction-Guided Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning for Continuous Robot Control'; Yang et al. NeurIPS 2019, 'A Generalized Algorithm for Multi-Objective RL and Policy Adaptation'.

published_sota.value: SAC ~5500 mean episode return after 3M env steps; TD3 ~5400; PPO ~3500 with careful tuning.
published_sota.source: Haarnoja et al. ICML 2018, 'Soft Actor-Critic'; Fujimoto et al. ICML 2018, 'Addressing Function Approximation Error in Actor-Critic Methods'.

our_baseline.note: Random policy ~120; TODO measure under TIME_BUDGET_HARD.
